form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (28.28) when sixth over 484m at Casino in a Grade 4/5. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 7th over 600m at Q Parklands beaten 6 lengths (35.61) behind Super Special in a Restricted WIN on March 29. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 710m at Q Parklands. Prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 710m at Q Parklands. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.5 lengths second (29.88) over 520m at Q Parklands. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the running rail in the front straight.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 6th in a Mix 5 on March 29 over 366m at Capalaba behind Outback Gold beaten 6 lengths (20.17). Must be included.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 550m (30.72) beating Ritza Ken in Grade 4/5 on March 28. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (36.13) at Q Parklands in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 22 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Others appear better placed.
